_comment: CODAI Daemon config — copy to each machine and customize

machine._note: Change 'id' to 'desktop' on the other machine. role: 'server' runs relay_server too.

relay._note: Replace DESKTOP_IP with your desktop's LAN IP or public IP. Use wss:// if behind SSL.

web_ui._note: Open http://localhost:8080 or http://DESKTOP_IP:8080 from any browser

schedule.prompt: Check the current state of the Codai project. Summarize any pending tasks, recent changes, and what should be worked on today. Be concise.
Generate a brief end-of-day summary: what was accomplished, any issues, and tomorrow's priorities.
Check if any training jobs are running. Report GPU/CPU usage, loss values, and ETA if available.
